redacted_summary: Updated the relevant integration plugin and restarted the instance, which restored service for affected users. For pairing failures that show access is not configured, first have newly onboarded users restart the instance from the console; if the issue remains, an instance administrator should approve the pairing request. For instances that stop responding while billing and intentional stop states are ruled out, check for exhausted temporary or disk storage, clean up space, and restart. A separate scheduler issue was identified where jobs targeting the main session with system-event payloads can fail with a client error.
